```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: Reduce noisy alerts while preserving incident detection fidelity.
---
Task:
Audit and tune alert rules for signal-to-noise quality.
Requirements:
Classify noisy rules, add dedup/suppression, and set clear severity levels.
Constraints:
Do not suppress true high-severity incident signals.
Success Criteria:
Fewer noisy pages and improved actionable alert ratio.
```
